inputs.srepr: Mul(Symbol('kappa_0', positive=True, real=True), Pow(Add(Integer(1), Mul(Integer(-1), Pow(Symbol('R', positive=True, real=True), Integer(-2)), Pow(Symbol('r', positive=True, real=True), Integer(2)))), Integer(3)))
